item.title: research
item.description: publications In the following, you find a list of my research publications together with a short abstract exp­lai­ning the respective main contribution. preprints conference proceedings Reinforced Concrete: Fast Hash Function for Zero Knowledge Proofs and Verifiable Computation with: Mario Barbara, Dmitry Khovratovich, Lorenzo Grassi, Christian Rechberger, Markus Schofnegger, Roman Walch eprint DOI -- bibtex -- @USENIX 2022 -- Short abstract Short description here. Influence of the Linear Layer on the Algebraic Degree in SP-Networks with: Carlos Cid, Aldo Gunsing, Lorenzo Grassi, Christian Rechberger, Markus Schofnegger @FSE 2022 eprint DOI -- bibtex Short abstract Most (keyed or unkeyed) cryptographic permutations admit a representation as a (multivariate) polynomial over a finite field.
